critical_invariants: Virtio block protocol must follow virtio-blk specification exactly
Sector alignment: all I/O must be aligned to 512-byte sector boundaries
Request header format: type (4 bytes), reserved (4 bytes), sector (8 bytes) - layout is fixed
Status byte must be checked after every I/O completion (0=OK, 1=IOERR, 2=UNSUPPORTED)
Descriptor chain order: header -> data -> status must be preserved
Write ordering: SFENCE before queue notify to ensure data is visible to device
Available ring update must be atomic with respect to device reads
known_opportunities: Command batching: submit multiple I/O requests before single queue notify
Queue depth optimization: use multiple in-flight descriptors for pipelined I/O
Read-ahead: speculatively issue sequential reads for locality
Write coalescing: merge adjacent sector writes into single large request
Indirect descriptor tables: reduce descriptor chain overhead for complex I/O
DISCARD/TRIM support for virtio-blk to improve SSD performance
Polling mode for low-latency I/O instead of interrupt-driven completion
